first_2_records.paper_title: ATMOSPHERIC water: AN ALTERNATIVE WATER RESOURCE FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION?
first_2_records.reason_for_exclusion: No THM (trihalomethanes) monitoring concentration data or directly related sampling metadata is present in the provided resolved web_html text; it discusses atmospheric water condensation as an alternative water resource and includes only general narrative plus publication dates.
first_2_records.notes: Resolved source type: web_html (https://revuema.fr/articles/7047).
